news.title: Berkshire annual meeting recap: Buffett says investing environment not ideal, sees 'gambling' in markets
news.description: Warren Buffett has loomed large at Berkshire Hathaway's annual shareholder meetings. Greg Abel tackled a wide array of topics in his first as CEO.

news.title: Spirit Airlines shuts down after failing to reach a bailout deal, ending discount travel era
news.description: Talks with bondholders for a government bailout this week failed to yield a deal.

news.title: After Spirit collapse, Duffy says there's no need for government budget airline bailout
news.description: Duffy said he does not think the government needs to bail out low-cost airlines that have sought $2.5 billion in government relief because of high fuel prices.

news.title: Weight loss and hair loss: The growing hair treatment market from GLP-1s
news.description: A common side effect of many GLP-1 drugs is hair loss. It's creating a formerly untapped but growing market for hair treatment products.

news.title: These stocks reporting next week have earnings momentum on their side
news.description: Stocks reporting earnings next week that are also seeing accelerating earnings momentum include Datadog and Block.

news.title: The U.S.-Iran war is coming for your credit score and mortgage application
news.description: The U.S.-Iran war and Strait of Hormuz closure have caused a global economic ripple effect, your credit score included as banks and lenders get tighter.

news.title: Musk testimony dominated first week Musk v. Altman. 'You can't just steal a charity'
news.description: Elon Musk, the world's richest person, took the stand and testified over the course of three days in his trial against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

news.title: Iran offers Strait of Hormuz deal; Trump dissatisfied but prefers non-military path
news.description: Trump said  he was not satisfied ​with the latest Iranian proposal. Iran's foreign minister said Tehran was ready for diplomacy if U.S. changes its approach.

news.title: Spirit Airlines shutting down after rescue talks collapse
news.description: The airline had been in talks with the Trump administration about a $500m bailout.

news.title: Trump says he will hike tariffs on EU cars to 25%
news.description: The current level of tariffs charged on goods entering the US from the EU is 15%, under a deal negotiated last July.

news.title: Mortgages, jobs and energy bills - how the Iran war will affect your money
news.description: The Bank of England's latest report reveals some interesting details on how our finances will be affected due to the Iran war.

news.title: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
news.description: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.

news.title: The Real Greek rescued by Cote Brasserie-owner
news.description: All but nine of the Mediterranean chain's 28 outlets are being taken over by the family-owned Karali group.

news.title: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
news.description: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?

news.title: Crayola toys recalled over possible asbestos contamination
news.description: People should stop using the products immediately and keep out of the reach of children, the government says.

news.title: No evidence of widespread fuel price-gouging, watchdog says
news.description: Profit margins were "broadly unchanged" between February and March, the UK's competition watchdog says.

news.title: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq kept their record rallies going. Here are 3 key takeaways
news.description: It seemed like what really captivated Wall Street though was corporate earnings.

news.title: Musk testimony dominated first week Musk v. Altman. 'You can't just steal a charity'
news.description: Elon Musk, the world's richest person, took the stand and testified over the course of three days in his trial against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

news.title: Jim Cramer says the market powered through a tough earnings week but 'that doesn't mean we're out of the woods yet'
news.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer looks to the jam-packed earnings week ahead and explains what he's looking for.

news.title: The market isn't grading all Big Tech earnings the same — here's why
news.description: After a big week of mega-cap tech earnings, investors are starting to differentiate AI tech winners from those still proving themselves.

news.title: Apple's stock gains as company execs cite iPhone, Mac demand in boosting guidance
news.description: On its quarterly earnings call, Apple said revenue growth in the current quarter would be between 14% and 17%, well above analysts' estimates.

news.title: Roblox shares plummet 18% as child safety measures weigh on bookings
news.description: Roblox is facing over 140 federal lawsuits accusing it of failing to prevent child exploitation, and last month settled with Alabama and West Virginia.

news.title: Atlassian stock soars 29% after earnings show strong cloud, data center growth
news.description: Atlassian's stock has been hit hard in the "SaaS-pocalypse" sweeping software names as AI threatens to disrupt their business models.

news.title: Apple earnings, DHS shutdown, 'Ozempic breath' and more in Morning Squawk
news.description: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
